remaining_spec_items: Sprint 1: Foundation — Restructure & Getting Started (directory structure, sidebars.ts, overview, quick-start, workflow-overview)
Sprint 2: User Guide — Workflow Steps 1-4 (create-project, data-processing, data-control, satellite-models)
Sprint 3: User Guide — Workflow Steps 5-8 (model-execution, stress-testing, overlays, sign-off)
Sprint 4: User Guide — Feature Pages Part 1 (model-registry, backtesting, regulatory-reports, gl-journals)
Sprint 5: User Guide — Feature Pages Part 2 + FAQ (approval-workflow, attribution, markov-hazard, advanced, faq)
Sprint 6: Admin Guide — Complete (9 pages: setup, data-mapping, model-config, app-settings, jobs, theme, sysadmin, users, troubleshooting)
Sprint 7: Developer Reference — Complete (5 pages: architecture, api-reference, data-model, ecl-engine, testing)
Sprint 8: Homepage, Navigation & Polish (homepage redesign, navbar/footer, cross-reference audit, final build)
last_action: Sprint 1 iter 1 complete: Foundation restructure with persona-based directories, 34 pages, 3 fully written content pages. Build succeeds 0 errors.
